detailed_execution_specification: This dataset is a long-format panel with repeated monthly rows across indicators. The execution engine will honour the execution_order entries and enabled flags declared in the JSON specification, so the implementation order is fixed and no transformation is inferred or skipped silently. The preprocessing stage shall first convert Date to datetime using the parameters supplied by the JSON contract. The long-format rows shall then be reshaped into a wide format using Date as the row identifier, Item as the source of the generated feature columns, and Value as the measure. The expected output is one row per unique Date, not one row per long-format observation. The generated indicator columns shall be flattened and cleaned so that the resulting dataset contains one row for each unique Date and a feature column for each indicator.
